$comment: CANONICAL ENDPOINT MANIFEST single source of truth for every Zatabox SDK. This is STRICTLY the publicly documented, integrator-facing REST surface as published at https://zatabox.com/docs/api (the organizer-portal-equivalent surface). Endpoints that are NOT on the public documentation page (platform admin, white-label internals, discovery rails, scanner tokens, wallets, MCP tokens, media upload, ticket PDF/QR, support, etc.) are intentionally EXCLUDED shipping them in a public SDK is a security risk. Each SDK's resource layer is GENERATED from this file by scripts/generate.mjs, so the five languages never drift. Path params are written as :name and become positional method arguments. kind defaults to 'json'; 'sse' generates a *Url() helper for streaming.

groups.title: Auth
groups.desc: Account registration, password + passwordless sign-in, 2FA login and token refresh.

endpoints.name: register
endpoints.desc: Register an account; returns the user plus an accessToken/refreshToken pair.

endpoints.name: login
endpoints.desc: Log in with email + password; returns a JWT pair (or a 2FA challenge).

endpoints.name: loginVerify2fa
endpoints.desc: Complete a 2FA login challenge; returns the JWT pair.

endpoints.name: requestToken
endpoints.desc: Passwordless: email a buyer a 6-digit login code.

endpoints.name: exchangeToken
endpoints.desc: Passwordless: exchange email + 6-digit code for a JWT pair.

endpoints.name: refresh
endpoints.desc: Refresh an expired access token (rotates the refresh token).

endpoints.name: logout
endpoints.desc: Revoke a refresh token.

groups.title: Events (Public)
groups.desc: Public event discovery and read, plus external ticket issuance.

endpoints.name: list
endpoints.desc: List and search published public events (cursor-paginated). Filters: q, category, city, and the read-only facets productType (event|reservation|digital) and course=true (courses within digital).

endpoints.name: search
endpoints.desc: Full-text + faceted event search. Same q/category/city/productType/course facets as events.list, plus date_from/date_to; each result carries category + read-only productType.

endpoints.name: get
endpoints.desc: Event detail by slug (organizer info, schedule, active ticket types; carries category + read-only productType).

endpoints.name: tickets
endpoints.desc: List an event's ticket types with live availability.

endpoints.name: issue
endpoints.desc: Issue tickets you sold elsewhere (developer-handled payment; 3% wallet fee on paid tickets).

groups.title: Seating (Public)
groups.desc: Interactive venue seating: the buyer-facing seat map, live availability and temporary seat holds. Only events an organizer has attached a venue map to expose these (others 404 NO_SEATING). Buy seats by passing venueSeatIds on orders.create. No auth required.

endpoints.name: seatmap
endpoints.desc: Get the seat map: sections, seats with x/y coordinates, stage/label elements, and the ticket type + price per section.

endpoints.name: seats
endpoints.desc: Live seat availability snapshot { sold, blocked, held } any seat id not listed is available.

endpoints.name: live
endpoints.desc: Server-Sent Events stream of live seat availability (a snapshot on connect, then seat_update events).

endpoints.name: hold
endpoints.desc: Hold (replace) the seats a buyer is selecting for an opaque holder token; returns { held, failed }.

endpoints.name: releaseHold
endpoints.desc: Release a holder's seat holds (omit seatIds in the body to release all of them).

groups.title: Organizer
groups.desc: Organizer surface: organization read, events, ticket types, schedule sessions, seating sections and promo codes.

endpoints.name: getOrganization
endpoints.desc: Get organization details and per-currency wallet balances.

endpoints.name: createEvent
endpoints.desc: Create a draft event.

endpoints.name: updateEvent
endpoints.desc: Partial-update an event.

endpoints.name: publishEvent
endpoints.desc: Publish a draft event.

endpoints.name: unpublishEvent
endpoints.desc: Unpublish a published event back to draft.

endpoints.name: deleteEvent
endpoints.desc: Cancel an event.

endpoints.name: createTicket
endpoints.desc: Create a ticket type.

endpoints.name: schedule
endpoints.desc: List schedule sessions (running order).

endpoints.name: createSchedule
endpoints.desc: Add a schedule session.

endpoints.name: updateSchedule
endpoints.desc: Update a schedule session.

endpoints.name: deleteSchedule
endpoints.desc: Delete a schedule session.

endpoints.name: sections
endpoints.desc: List seating/capacity sections.

endpoints.name: createSection
endpoints.desc: Add a seating section.

endpoints.name: updateSection
endpoints.desc: Update a seating section.

endpoints.name: deleteSection
endpoints.desc: Delete a seating section.

endpoints.name: venues
endpoints.desc: Browse published venue seat maps you can attach to an event (interactive seating).

endpoints.name: getEventSeating
endpoints.desc: Get an event's interactive-seating setup: attached map, section→ticket-type pricing, and blocked/sold seats.

endpoints.name: attachSeating
endpoints.desc: Attach a published venue map to the event (body: venueMapId, optional mode/holdTtlSeconds).

endpoints.name: detachSeating
endpoints.desc: Remove interactive seating from the event (only before any seat sells).

endpoints.name: setSeatingPricing
endpoints.desc: Map each venue section to one of the event's ticket types (body: mappings:[{venueSectionId, ticketTypeId}]).

endpoints.name: setSeatingBlocks
endpoints.desc: Block or unblock seats for the event (body: block:[seatId], unblock:[seatId]).

endpoints.name: promoCodes
endpoints.desc: List promo codes (optionally filtered by event).

endpoints.name: createPromoCode
endpoints.desc: Create a promo code.

endpoints.name: updatePromoCode
endpoints.desc: Update a promo code.

endpoints.name: deletePromoCode
endpoints.desc: Delete or disable a promo code.

groups.title: Event page customization
groups.desc: Per-event public-page theming and the “Good to know” FAQ.

endpoints.name: get
endpoints.desc: Get an event's page customization (theme, layout, FAQ, SEO).

endpoints.name: update
endpoints.desc: Update an event's page customization (incl. the FAQ list).

endpoints.name: validatePromo
endpoints.desc: Validate a promo code against a cart (read-only preview, does not consume a use).

groups.title: Orders
groups.desc: Carted checkout: create, read, pay, cancel.

endpoints.name: create
endpoints.desc: Create an order (guest checkout needs only name + email).

endpoints.name: get
endpoints.desc: Get an order (pass ?token for guest reads).

endpoints.name: pay
endpoints.desc: Initiate payment (provider: nowpayments | paystack | flutterwave).

endpoints.name: cancel
endpoints.desc: Cancel an unpaid order and release held inventory.

groups.title: Payments
groups.desc: Verify charges, read payment status, list crypto coins.

endpoints.name: verify
endpoints.desc: Actively verify a payment with the provider and issue tickets (idempotent, poll-safe).

endpoints.name: get
endpoints.desc: Read payment/order status and attempts (read-only).

endpoints.name: cryptoCurrencies
endpoints.desc: List supported NOWPayments crypto coins (for the payCurrency value).

groups.title: Check-in
groups.desc: Gate scanning, offline manifests + sync, live stats.

endpoints.name: scan
endpoints.desc: Validate a QR, barcode or 6-character door code at the gate.

endpoints.name: manual
endpoints.desc: Manually check in a typed ticket code.

endpoints.name: manifest
endpoints.desc: Hashed guest-list manifest for offline scanning (pass ?since for a delta).

endpoints.name: batch
endpoints.desc: Sync up to 500 queued offline scans.

endpoints.name: stats
endpoints.desc: Check-in totals, capacity %, entry rate and per-gate breakdown.

endpoints.name: gate
endpoints.desc: Per-gate check-in stats slice.

endpoints.name: live
endpoints.desc: Server-Sent Events stream a stats snapshot every 2 seconds.

groups.title: Community
groups.desc: Verified-attendee reviews, organizer follows/subscribers and event waitlists.

endpoints.name: submitReview
endpoints.desc: Review an event (checked-in ticket holders only; ticketCode + email prove attendance).

endpoints.name: follow
endpoints.desc: Follow an organizer (subscribe to new-event announcements).

endpoints.name: followers
endpoints.desc: List an organizer's subscribers (organizer auth).

endpoints.name: removeFollower
endpoints.desc: Remove a subscriber (organizer auth).

endpoints.name: joinWaitlist
endpoints.desc: Join an event waitlist (offers fire on cancellations).

groups.title: Growth (Organizer)
groups.desc: Comp tickets, CSV import, broadcasts and attendee tags.

endpoints.name: mintComps
endpoints.desc: Bulk-mint and email complimentary tickets.

endpoints.name: importCompsCsv
endpoints.desc: Import attendees (comp tickets) from CSV.

endpoints.name: broadcastEvent
endpoints.desc: Email a broadcast to an event's attendees (replies thread to the organizer inbox).

endpoints.name: addTags
endpoints.desc: Tag attendees (additive; powers broadcast filters and CRM segments).

endpoints.name: removeTag
endpoints.desc: Remove an attendee tag.

groups.title: Buyers
groups.desc: The authenticated buyer: profile, ticket wallet, data export, refunds, reports and organizer messaging.

endpoints.name: me
endpoints.desc: Current buyer profile.

endpoints.name: tickets
endpoints.desc: The buyer's ticket wallet (cursor-paginated).

endpoints.name: export
endpoints.desc: GDPR data export one JSON download of everything on the account.

endpoints.name: createRefund
endpoints.desc: Request a refund for a ticket.

endpoints.name: createReport
endpoints.desc: File a report against an event or organizer.

endpoints.name: messages
endpoints.desc: The buyer's message threads with organizers.

endpoints.name: sendTicketMessage
endpoints.desc: Message the organizer about a ticket (rate-limited).

groups.title: Courses (Learner)
groups.desc: The authenticated buyer's online-course learner surface: enrolled courses, lesson/course completion, the exam, and the completion certificate. Course content (paid lesson media, writeups, pins) is delivered only to enrolled ticket holders; media links returned here are short-lived signed /media URLs. Buyer auth (a ticket for the course) required.

endpoints.name: mine
endpoints.desc: List the buyer's enrolled courses, each with course meta and a progress summary (started courses first). No lesson content.

endpoints.name: get
endpoints.desc: Get one course's full learner payload: meta + progress + lessons (syllabus, with completed flags and signed media) or a unified content block.

endpoints.name: completeLesson
endpoints.desc: Mark a syllabus lesson complete (idempotent, zero-based index). Completing the last requirement finishes the course and may issue a certificate.

endpoints.name: uncompleteLesson
endpoints.desc: Reverse a syllabus lesson completion (does not revoke an already-issued certificate).

endpoints.name: complete
endpoints.desc: Complete a unified course (unified courses only): marks the single learning unit complete.

endpoints.name: exam
endpoints.desc: Get the course exam to take. Correct answers and explanations are stripped server-side.

endpoints.name: submitExam
endpoints.desc: Submit the exam (body: answers:[{questionId, selectedIndex}]) for server-side grading; a pass drives completion + certificate issuance.

endpoints.name: certificate
endpoints.desc: Download the issued completion certificate as a PDF (404 CERTIFICATE_NOT_ISSUED until earned).

groups.title: API keys
groups.desc: Manage your organization's own API keys (organizer owner/admin auth).

endpoints.name: createApiKey
endpoints.desc: Create an API key (plaintext secret returned exactly once).

endpoints.name: listApiKeys
endpoints.desc: List API keys (prefixes and metadata only, never the secret).

endpoints.name: updateApiKey
endpoints.desc: Update a key (rename, pause, re-scope).

endpoints.name: rotateApiKey
endpoints.desc: Rotate a key's secret (new secret returned once; old one invalidated).

endpoints.name: deleteApiKey
endpoints.desc: Revoke an API key.

groups.title: Webhooks
groups.desc: Register webhook endpoints, manage secrets, inspect and replay deliveries. (Use webhooks.verify() to validate inbound signatures.)

endpoints.name: create
endpoints.desc: Create a webhook endpoint (signing secret returned exactly once).

endpoints.name: list
endpoints.desc: List webhook endpoints.

endpoints.name: update
endpoints.desc: Update a webhook endpoint.

endpoints.name: delete
endpoints.desc: Delete a webhook endpoint.

endpoints.name: test
endpoints.desc: Send a signed test event to the endpoint.

endpoints.name: rotateSecret
endpoints.desc: Rotate the signing secret (new secret returned once).

endpoints.name: deliveries
endpoints.desc: List delivery attempts for an endpoint.

endpoints.name: replay
endpoints.desc: Replay a past delivery.

endpoints.name: catalog
endpoints.desc: List every subscribable event type (no auth).
